packageRules.description: Group minor and patch updates per ecosystem to reduce PR noise. Majors always stay separate so they get individual review.
Tag major-version PRs explicitly. These are the ones most likely to break the build and deserve a human read.
GitHub Actions get pinned to SHA by helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests. Bumps are pure SHA refreshes; group them together so a CVE fix to actions/checkout doesn't sit alone for a week.
